hooks.command: if [ "${SQUADS_FAST:-0}" = "1" ]; then bash "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/squads-hook.sh" session-start; elif command -v python >/dev/null 2>&1; then python "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/perf-hook.py" session-start; elif command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/perf-hook.py" session-start; else bash "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/squads-hook.sh" session-start; fi

if [ "${SQUADS_FAST:-0}" = "1" ]; then bash "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/squads-hook.sh" dispatch-check; elif command -v python >/dev/null 2>&1; then python "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/perf-hook.py" dispatch-check; elif command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/perf-hook.py" dispatch-check; else bash "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/squads-hook.sh" dispatch-check; fi

if [ "${SQUADS_FAST:-0}" = "1" ]; then bash "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/squads-hook.sh" pre-tool; elif command -v python >/dev/null 2>&1; then python "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/perf-hook.py" pre-tool; elif command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/perf-hook.py" pre-tool; else bash "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/squads-hook.sh" pre-tool; fi

if [ "${SQUADS_FAST:-0}" = "1" ]; then bash "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/squads-hook.sh" post-tool; elif command -v python >/dev/null 2>&1; then python "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/perf-hook.py" post-tool; elif command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/perf-hook.py" post-tool; else bash "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/squads-hook.sh" post-tool; fi
